items.title: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
items.summary: penAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of to the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，反映头部玩家最新动作。

items.title: Patronus AI lands $50M to build ‘digital worlds’ that stress-test AI agents
items.summary: Agent-testing startup Patronus AI, founded by former Meta AI researchers, is experiencing nearly insatiable demand, its investor says.
items.reason: AI Coding 领域重要动态，AI Agent 工程化趋势明显。

items.title: Anthropic’s Claude is winning over paid consumers, a market owned by ChatGPT
items.summary: Despite ChatGPT's commanding market lead, consumers who pay for AI have been increasingly choosing Anthropic's Claude, data shows.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，Claude 生态持续扩展。

items.title: Notion killing Skiff-influenced email app since most users use AI agents instead
items.summary: Notion is "going all in on using agents to run your inbox."
items.reason: AI Coding 领域重要动态，AI Agent 工程化趋势明显。

items.title: Google finally releases a Finance Android app, promises iOS version later in 2026
items.summary: It took 20 years, but the Finance app arrives just in time to be packed full of AI.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。
